test_case_results.title: Home Route should consist of at least two HTML list items, and the Initial Months List, Days List and Emojis List should be rendered using a unique key as a prop to display each month item, day item and emoji item respectively
Home Route should consist of an HTML main heading element with text content as "Daily Mood Tracker" in the header
Home Route should consist of at least three HTML unordered list elements to display the list of emoji items, day items and date items
Home Route should consist of at least forty three HTML list elements to display the emoji items, day items and date items
Home Route should consist of at least thirty six HTML button elements each inside an HTML list item to display the emoji items and date items
Home Route should consist of at least seven HTML paragraph elements each inside an HTML list item to display the day items
Home Route should consist of an HTML main heading element with text content as "January"
Home Route should consist of an HTML paragraph elements with text content as the values of the key "day" from the "daysList" provided
Home Route should consist of an HTML paragraph elements with text content as the values of the key "date" from the "initialMonthsList" provided
Home Route should consist of an HTML paragraph elements with text content as the values of the key "emojiName" from the Emojis List provided
Home Route should consist of an HTML image elements with alt attribute value as the values of the key "emojiName" and src as the values of the key "emojiUrl" from the Emojis List provided
Home Route should consist of two HTML select elements which contains Emoji names and Days as options
Home Route should consist of Emoji names HTML select element and it contains of HTML option elements with text content as the value of the key "emojiName" from the Emojis List provided
Home Route should consist of Days HTML select element and it consists of HTML option elements with text content as the values of the key "day" from the Days List provided
Initially when the Home Route is opened, the "Very Happy" emoji should be displayed as active emoji
When the "Happy" emoji is clicked in the Home Route, then it should be displayed as active emoji
When the "Neutral" emoji is clicked in the Home Route, then it should be displayed as active emoji
When the "Sad" emoji is clicked in the Home Route, then it should be displayed as active emoji
When the "Very Sad" emoji is clicked in the Home Route, then it should be displayed as active emoji

When few date items are clicked in the Home Route, then the active emoji image will be displayed in the date items and the emoji image elements with alt attribute value as the values of the key "date" from the Initial Months List provided

When "/" is provided as the URL path by an unauthenticated user, then the page should be navigated to the Login Route

When "/" is provided as the URL path by an authenticated user, then the page should be navigated to the Reports Route and should consist of an HTML paragraph element with text content as "Overall Emojis Reports"
Reports Route should consist of an HTML button element with text content as "Logout" in the Header
Reports Route should consist of a Link from react-router-dom with text content as "Home"
Reports Route should consist of a Link from react-router-dom with text content as "Reports"
Reports Route should consist of all 5 emojis as cards
Reports Route should consist of an HTML heading element with text content as "Overall Emojis Reports"

In the Home Route, after 4 date items have been selected in January and the Reports Route is accessed, then the page should display an HTML paragraph element containing the text "4" within the "Very Happy" emoji card

In the Home Route, after 4 date items have been selected in January and another 4 in December and the Reports Route is accessed, then the page should display an HTML paragraph element containing the text "8" within the "Very Happy" emoji card

When the "Very Sad" emoji item is active in the Home Route and after 4 date items have been selected in January and the Reports Route is accessed, then the page should display an HTML paragraph element containing the text "4" within the "Very Sad" emoji card

When the "Very Sad" emoji item is active in the Home Route and after 4 date items have been selected in January and another 4 in December and the Reports Route is accessed, then the page should display an HTML paragraph element containing the text "8" within the "Very Sad" emoji card
When the Reports Route is opened, then the page should consist of a Bar chart to represent the month-specific selected emojis data in graph format
When "/login" is provided as the URL by an unauthenticated user, then the page should be navigated to Login Route and should consist of an HTML button element with text content as "Login"

When "/login" is provided as the URL by an authenticated user, then the page should be navigated to Home Route and should consist of an HTML heading element with text content as "Daily Mood Tracker" in the header
Login Route should consist of an HTML form element
Login Route should consist of an HTML image element with text content value as "Daily Mood Tracker"
Login Route should consist of an HTML input element with label text as "USERNAME" and type attribute value as "text"
Login Route should consist of an HTML input element with label text as "PASSWORD" and type attribute value as "password"
Login Route should consist of an HTML input element with label text as "Show Password" and type attribute value as "checkbox"
Login Route should consist of an HTML button element with text content as "Login" and type attribute value as "submit"
When a non-empty value is provided in the HTML input element with the label text as "USERNAME", then the value provided should be displayed in the HTML input element
When a non-empty value is provided in the HTML input element with the label text as "PASSWORD", then the value provided should be displayed in the HTML input element
When "Show Password" is checked, then the type of the HTML input element with label text as "PASSWORD" should be "text"
When the "Show Password" is unchecked after being checked, then then the type of the input element with label text as "PASSWORD" should be "password"
When non-empty values are provided for username and password input and the Login button is clicked, an HTTP POST request should be made to loginApiUrl

When non-empty values are provided for username and password input and the Login button is clicked, then an HTTP POST request should be made to loginApiUrl with request object containing the keys "username" and "password" with the values provided respectively
When an invalid username and password are provided, then the page should consist of an HTML paragraph element with text content as respective error message and the page should not be navigated

When a valid username and password are provided and the Login button is clicked, then the Cookies.set() method should be called with three arguments - "jwt_token" string as the first argument, JWT token value as the second argument, and expiry days as the third argument
When a valid username and password are provided and the Login button is clicked, then the history.replace() method should be called with the argument "/"

When a valid username and password are provided and the Login button is clicked, then the page should be navigated to Home Route and should consist of an HTML main heading element with text content as "Daily Mood Tracker"
